file_analyses.filePurpose: Heuristic analysis of eslint.config.js. API-powered semantic analysis was not used.

accuracy.explanation: Estimated from TODO/FIXME density and basic structural signals.

efficiency.explanation: Estimated from branching/loop density and potential readability hotspots.

maintainability.explanation: Estimated from line length and structural readability.

weaknesses.issue: No major static issues detected in heuristic mode
weaknesses.reason: Heuristic pass did not find significant structural problems.

suggestions.suggestion: Add concise doc comments for key functions and modules
suggestions.recommended: Add intent-focused comments near complex logic
suggestions.benefit: Speeds up onboarding and reduces maintenance cost.

codeQualityIssues.description: Low amount of inline or block comments detected.
